input.testCaseTitle: For admin, all tabs should be visible & editable
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-342 reported defect: For admin, all tabs should be visible & editable
input.errorMessage: For admin, all tabs should be visible & editable

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Admin did not have the intended all-access permission set for product tabs. The ERP/DAM tab visibility and editability were corrected so Admin can verify data added by other users.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.91. ui-regression is acceptable only as a surface symptom; the comments state the reason was admin access.
